description: Review code changes introduced within a configurable recent time window, including uncommitted changes, and delegate any blocking findings into the design-and-implement workflow before re-reviewing until no high or mid findings remain.

prompts.divedraPromptTemplate: Coordinate {{workflowId}}. Start at Step 1 review. Step 1 reviews recent committed and uncommitted changes. Step 2 inspects Step 1 and routes to Step 3 when any high or mid finding remains; otherwise route to workflow-output and finish. Step 3 packages the blocking findings and dispatches design-and-implement-review-loop. After the delegated workflow completes, resume at Step 4, capture the accepted delegated result, and then route back to Step 1 for another review pass. Finish only after Step 1 has no high or mid findings.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise business JSON only. Keep severity, reviewed commands, delegated-workflow inputs, changed files, verification, and routing decisions explicit.

steps.description: Review committed changes from the recent time window plus uncommitted changes.
Exit when Step 1 has no high or mid findings; otherwise send the blocking findings into the delegated implementation handoff.
Package blocking findings into a delegated issue-resolution request for design-and-implement-review-loop.
Consume the delegated workflow result and prepare the next recent-change review pass.
Publish the accepted review summary once no high or mid findings remain.
